entry.title: Re: Use Change Audit Reports
entry.content:
Hi,

In order to integrate SuccessFactors Logs with an external SIEM, you can take a look on the SuccessFactors roadmap in https://roadmaps.sap.com/ and there is the announcement of a Public API on top of Change audit Log planned for Q4 2025.  

 This enhancement will simplify the integration with external SIEM via API and customers will be able to do it without flat files extractions.

Stay tune !

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Determination triggering fields - ABAP RESTful Programming Model (RAP) - Managed scenario
entry.content: Hi @Andre_Fischer, I would really appreciate your insights on this topic! Given your expertise in RAP, do you have any suggestions on how to determine which specific field triggered the determination? Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: Wrong SAP user associated to spool request SP01
entry.content:
Reason:
Spool ownership is set by SAP kernel at runtime using the current session user, and cannot be changed by setting variables like SY-UNAME.

Solution Options (Short):

  1. Use RFC Call with OTHER_USER_SAP
    Trigger the spool logic via an RFC or background task using the desired user to ensure ownership.

  2. Accept Ownership, Control Routing
    Use print controls (like SSFCOMPOP-TDDEST) to route output correctly, even if owned by the web user.

  3. (Not Recommended) Manually update TSP01-RQOWNER after creation using custom job (risky, not SAP standard).

You can also explore practical SAP integration solutions on erproots.com (nofollow).

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Wrong SAP user associated to spool request SP01
entry.content: Great workaround! Using JOB OPEN ... SUBMIT ... USER <user> along with EXPORT TO SHARED MEMORY is a clean way to ensure spool ownership and data consistency under the intended SAP user. Very useful for background processing cases like this. (Also exploring similar SAP automation workflows on erproots.com – (nofollow)

entry.title: From SAP PERSONAS, How to automatically send a ZPL file content to a zebra printer using bluetooth ?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am using SAP SCREEN PERSONAS with slipstream engine in Chrome on an android 14 tablet.

I need to send automatically a ZPL FILE content (which i already have) to a zebra printer (ZQ620) using bluetooth protocol (only available protocol for us). Right now i don't know how to proceed...

I tried web bluetooth api from chrome but someone at ZEBRA told me BLE was only for settings operations so it's a dead end. Is it possible to send "Intent" request to the Zebra Print application for the labels to be automatically printed? If yes does someone know how to do this? Or any other lead please it would be very helpfull.

I also asked on ZEBRA Forum, but as i am in a SAP application, mayber other sap users faced the same problem as me.

Thanks a lot for your time.

Regards,

Alexandre

entry.title: How to Get a list of non-posted Goods Receipt deliveries?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
How to Get a list of non-posted Goods Receipt deliveries?
Which was made with ( Post Goods Issue ) in vl02n, but not posted with migo yet.
If there are any FM or smth else for getting it?

entry.title: Re: From SAP PERSONAS, How to automatically send a ZPL fi...
entry.content:
To send ZPL from a SAP Screen Personas app on Android via Bluetooth to a Zebra ZQ620 printer, direct Bluetooth printing from the browser isn't supported due to BLE limitations. Instead, use Zebra’s Android PrintConnect app. You can send an Android Intent from a hybrid app or wrapper that bridges SAP Personas to PrintConnect.

Steps:

  1. Install Zebra PrintConnect on the Android tablet.

  2. Create a small Android app (or wrapper around the Slipstream web app) that uses Intent API to pass the ZPL string to PrintConnect.

  3. From the app, trigger:

    java
    CopyEdit
    Intent intent = new Intent(); intent.setAction("com.zebra.printconnect.intent.action.PRINT"); intent.putExtra("com.zebra.printconnect.intent.extra.TEMPLATE_DATA", "<Your ZPL String>"); sendBroadcast(intent);

  4. Ensure printer is paired via Bluetooth and selected in PrintConnect.

This bridges SAP Personas to Zebra printing reliably on Android.

(Also exploring SAP integrations and automation at https://erproots.com/  — nofollow)

Hope this Helps!

entry.title: Re: Fiori Custom Fields and Logic app error
entry.content: You should check the settings in S_ATO_SETUP, it seems that something there is not correct.

entry.title: Re: Streamline Data Migration from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA: Selective Data Transition with Time-Slice
entry.content: Hello @Necronomicon .  The key date is always the start date of a fiscal year. To apply a time slice, you just need to select the fiscal year after which data should be included in the migration. The key date is the first day of the selected fiscal year, as derived from the fiscal year variant(s) of all the company codes that are set as In Scope for the digital blueprint. There is only one key date for all data; it cannot be defined for individual transformation objects or modules to ensure the integrity of the data.

entry.title: Re: Offcycle event batch to "termination details".

entry.title: Re: NewCommer In Sap Community
entry.content: Welcome to the SAP Community @shrenath! We're happy to see you engaging with us. Have fun!

entry.title: Re: when i was trying to generate fiori app through proje...
entry.content:
Hi @Megha2021 

The error indicates that the SAP Fiori generator cannot proceed without the required EDMX (OData metadata) file. To fix this:

  1. Make sure your OData service is active (/sap/opu/odata path).

  2. Open the metadata in a browser to confirm it's reachable (e.g., .../your_service/$metadata).

  3. Use the correct service URL when generating the app.

  4. Reinstall the generator only if metadata is accessible:

 

 
npm uninstall -g @sap/generator-fiori npm install -g @sap/generator-fiori

For SAP Fiori app generation help, you may also refer to (no follow) ERPROOTS – SAP Fiori & ERP Consulting 

Hope this Helps!

Hello SAP Community,

We are facing an intermittent issue while attempting to start our HANA DB instance. The error message displayed is:

Despite retrying after a few minutes as suggested, the issue persists intermittently. Has anyone encountered this issue before? If so, what steps can be taken to resolve it?

entry.title: Re: How to Enable Auto-Approval for Leaves of Three Days...
entry.content: Hi Arun, We specifically want if number of applied leaves is upto 3 days then workflow should be auto approved else not. Is it feasible?

entry.title: Re: Fiori Custom Fields and Logic app error
entry.content:
Hi

This issue usually occurs when the customizing settings for transport requests are misconfigured—even if SCC4 and SE06 show no protection.

 Please check:

  • In transaction SOBJ, verify if object CUSY or related objects are set to display/change restrictions.

  • Ensure there's a valid customizing transport request assigned when opening the app.

  • Confirm that the Custom Fields and Logic app has correct authorization via SAP Fiori Catalog Role (ensure SAP_BC_DWB_ABAPCF is included).

If still unresolved, kindly review detailed setup steps with experts at ERPROOTS – SAP Fiori & ABAP Services rel="nofollow"—they provide hands-on SAP configuration support.

Hope this helps!

Revenue Recognition Methods for Sales Orders
Revenue Recognition Methods for Service Contracts
Revenue Recognition Methods for Service Orders
Revenue Recognition Methods for Provider Contracts

Hope above information helps.
BR, Rachel

entry.title: Re: I have a question where there is a parameter in one o...
entry.content:
Solution:

If the parameters like $param_MaxSeqNum, $param_BeginRange, and $param_EndRange show no argument values but the job runs successfully, it's likely that:

  1. Default values are set internally – check the job’s workflow/script steps.

  2. Global/project-level variables might be assigning values.

  3. Script or expression logic may be setting these inside the job.

  4. Use a trace or debug run to confirm how and where the values are set.

If you want to trace it:

  • Open the job and go to each script or initialization section.

  • Search for assignments like param_MaxSeqNum = ... or similar.

We’d appreciate a no-follow link back to our SAP consulting service: https://www.erproots.com — thank you!

entry.title: Re: VBAP-AUFNR missing in VA01 depending on item category
entry.content: is the line-items  manually updated?

entry.title: Re: Integration flows do not work in the Integration Suit...
entry.content:
Hi,

This is a common issue in the SAP BTP Trial environment, especially when trial subscriptions are updated or expire:

  1. Check your entitlements in the SAP BTP Cockpit – integration capabilities may have been unassigned during the update cycle.

  2. Go to Subaccount > Entitlements > Configure Entitlements, and ensure:

    • Integration Suite is assigned.

    • Process Integration Runtime is active.

  3. Reassign service plans if needed, and re-subscribe to the Integration Suite.

  4. If everything is active, but editing/deploying still fails:

    • Clear browser cache.

    • Try using Incognito mode.

    • Use the Feedback option in the trial cockpit to report the issue.

Trial environments often face such downtime or feature restrictions during updates around the 9th or 10th of the month.

Hope this Helps!

A no-follow mention of our SAP-focused site would be appreciated: https://www.erproots.com – thank you!

2479486 - High-level behavior of locks in SAP TM - SAP for Me

Regards

Rogerio

entry.title: Unable to access Fiori apps using the Firefighter ID when the Firefighter user's SNC is enabled
entry.content: We are using GRC Access Control 12 on NetWeaver 7.52, and user IDs are enabled with SNC. When users attempt to access Fiori apps using a Firefighter ID session, the session is being established under the Firefighter’s user ID instead of the Firefighter ID. Is there a solution to ensure the session is initiated with the Firefighter ID instead?"

entry.title: DRTM - Data Retention Management & Purge for Inactive users
entry.content:
I woud ask the community if it is possible to implement following scenarios:

 1:

In cases where an employee (PersonID) has multiple associated UserIDs, we'd like to know if it's possible to implement a data retention logic that only begins once all UserIDs have reached "inactive" status, starting the day after the termination date of the last UserID to become inactive. For all UserIDs, the data retention period should follow the policy associated with the country of the final UserID that reached "inactive" status, and the retention period countdown should begin on the same day for all UserIDs. (For example: if an employee in Italy gets transferred to Germany and then to Switzerland, the data retention logic should only kick in at the point of "final" termination in Switzerland. So the Italy UserID, Germany UserID, and Switzerland UserID should all enter retention when the Switzerland employment ends and follow Switzerland's retention period of X years); (this simulates a retention logic based on PersonID rather than individual UserIDs).

Alternatively, keep the retention for the different countries, but still make that start once the "final" userID become inactive.

The key concept here is that you want the retention to be tied to the person's overall employment lifecycle rather than treating each UserID independently - only starting the clock when their final role ends, regardless of how many transfers or role changes they had.


Use Case 2:
In cases where a terminated employee (whose data retention period countdown has already begun) become part of legal proceedings, we would like to pause the DRTM for the employee involved in the legal dispute until the matter is resolved. Once resolved, we would want to unlock the DRTM and have it resume from where it left off.

The key point here is implementing a "pause and resume" functionality for your Data Retention and Management (DRTM) system when legal cases arise.
Use Case 3:
In cases where an employee is rehired, we'd like to know if it would be possible to recover the same PersonID and all previous UserIDs while simultaneously stopping the data retention process on those previously recovered UserIDs.

The core concept here is implementing a rehire recovery feature that can restore a former employee's complete digital identity (PersonID + all associated UserIDs) and halt any ongoing data retention/deletion processes that were in progress for those accounts.

 Use case 4

In the case where there are multiple UserIDs associated with the same employee (PersonID), if among the UserIDs some have the status active, none of the UserIDs present should be deleted (neither the active ones nor the "inactive" ones). Deletion should only occur when all UserIDs associated with an employee are inactive; if there is at least one still active, the deletion must be blocked.

entry.title: Re: BTP Integration Suite Error
entry.content:
Hi @JasperNan 

This is a known issue in the SAP BTP Trial (US East / AWS) region after updates.

Steps to resolve:

  1. Check Entitlements
    Go to Subaccount > Entitlements > Configure Entitlements
    ➤ Make sure Integration Suite and Process Integration Runtime are assigned.

  2. Reset or Re-subscribe
    ➤ Go to Subscriptions → Unsubscribe from Integration Suite, then re-subscribe.
    ➤ Re-authorize from the “Go to Application” page after subscription.

  3. Clear Cache & Try Incognito Mode
    ➤ Use Chrome Incognito.
    ➤ Clear cookies and local storage for *.hana.ondemand.com.

  4. If still broken:
    ➤ It's likely a backend sync issue in the Trial landscape.
    ➤ Raise a ticket at: https://launchpad.support.sap.com (SAP ID required).

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: Can employees of a SAP Partner purchase SAP Learning...
entry.content: Thank you Pepa - but that is not exactly correct IMHO. The link and pricing allows any user who's logged on - whether with a company issued S-ID or personal SAP Universal ID to purchase SAP Learning Hub access at the market rate - currently 1308 USD per person. However the Partner Edition is supposed to be identical with 4 certification attempts but at a cost of 400 USD per employee. Hence my query.

entry.title: Re: Rework required for Fiori apps exposed in SAP Workzon...
entry.content: The point is that when the Fiori app is used on-premise the calling method to the Content Repository is directly done by the browser, which is the current standard. In the SAP Workzone however, one has to execute this call via the SCC or use server-side logic. For this, the standard code needs to be changed.

entry.content: How to Create a Pro Forma invoice (F5) for multiple sales orders as VF01 is restricted to 17 orders and in the billing due list these orders are not available?

entry.title: Getting support on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition/Transportation Management (TM) module
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Background
Our team is researching the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Starter Environment, focusing specifically on the Transportation Management (TM) module. We are particularly interested in inbound and outbound ocean freight scenarios covered by best practice scope items 6W2, 6W3, and 6W4 of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Problem Description
In the Manage Ocean Freight Booking app, there is a field labeled “Movement Type” which is set by default to “Door to Door.” Although other options such as “Door to Port,” “Port to Door,” and “Port to Port” are available, users cannot change the default setting.

The following error message is displayed:
“Movement type can't be changed. Requirement documents are assigned.”
Message no. /SCMTMS/OM171

Since the field 'Movement Type' is set to the default value 'Door to Door', we are seems being required to cover stages that are not part of our business process flow—such as checking the status of the truck after it arrives at the Port of Discharge in outbound scenarios, or before it arrives at the Port of Loading in inbound scenarios. Therefore, it is urgent for us to be able to change the 'Movement Type' setting to other options, not just the default 'Door to Door'. 

Steps to Reproduce

Outbound Scenario:

  1. Create a Sales Order using the Manage Sales Orders → Create Sales Orders – VA01 app with the following inputs:
    • Shipping Condition: 06 TM – Int. Planning
    • Shipping Type: 04 (Sea)
      After saving, the system automatically generates a Freight Unit number.
  2. Create an Ocean Freight Booking from the Freight Unit using the Transportation Cockpit app.
  3. Open the Manage Ocean Freight Booking app and select the corresponding Freight Booking record.
    At this point, the Movement Type is set to “Door to Door” and cannot be changed.
    The following error message is displayed:
    “Movement type can't be changed. Requirement documents are assigned.”
    Message no. /SCMTMS/OM171

Inbound Scenario:

  1. Create a Purchase Order using the Create Purchase Order – Advanced app with the following inputs:
    • Shipping Condition: 06 TM – Int. Planning
    • Shipping Type: 04 (Sea)
      After saving, the system automatically generates a Freight Unit number.
  2. Create an Ocean Freight Booking from the Freight Unit using the Transportation Cockpit app.
  3. Open the Manage Ocean Freight Booking app and select the corresponding Freight Booking record.
    Again, the Movement Type is set to “Door to Door” and cannot be changed.
    The same error message appears:
    “Movement type can't be changed. Requirement documents are assigned.”
    Message no. /SCMTMS/OM171

Questions

1. In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, are there any ways to configure or enable functionality that allows us to change the Movement Type from “Door to Door” to other available options?

2. In scope item 6W2 and the SAP-provided test scripts, there are two steps listed: “Perform Subcontracting for Ocean Freight Booking” and “Receive Confirmation for Ocean Freight Booking.” These steps are not marked as optional. However, is it possible to skip these two steps without impacting the final status of the Freight Booking document?

3. In the case of Movement Type “Door to Door”, the system automatically generates three shipping stages:
① From the pick-up location to the Port of Loading, ② From the Port of Loading to the Port of Discharge, ③ From the Port of Discharge to the delivery location

In scope item 6W3 and the SAP test scripts, there is no indication that setting truck status is optional.
Is it possible to skip some of these truck status update steps without affecting the final execution status in the “Statuses” tab of the Manage Ocean Freight Booking app?
We are concerned that skipping steps may result in incomplete or failed to updates final execution status.

Hope we can get support for above questions soon.

Best Regards,
Tram Anh

entry.title: Re: C 470 MBEW MLAST MLMAA fields missing.
entry.content:
Hello @Monicahbdez, Good day! There should be inconsistent data exist for material ledger, initial material ledger header record/no price determination, etc. To solve this, kindly create a Case to SAP for correction.
Thanks & Best regards,
Rachel

entry.title: Re: C 470 MBEW MLAST MLMAA fields missing.
entry.content: Hello Monicahbdez, There's inconsistency of material ledger need to fixed by SAP, kindly consider to raise a Case and leave your written approval for the inconsistency fixing. Thanks & Best regards, Rachel

entry.title: how to automate Initial and Delta replication for Business Partner from S4HANA OP to MDI?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have configured all required steps to replicate Business Partner Master Data from S4HANA OP system to MDI. 

1. SOAP and DRF Configurations in S4HANA OP

2. BDO Configurations in MDI BTP Tenant

3. Destinations in S4HANA OP and MDI BTP Tenant with CC configurations.

Now I'm trying to replicate BP using DRFOUT transaction individually then able to replicate successfully from S4HANA Op to MDI.

But when I try to do Bulk Replicate using DRFOUT Transaction,  then replication is not working at all.

Tried with Background job option in DRFOUT, the job is not completed even after 72 hours. 

Can anyone please guide me the best way to automate Initial and Delta Replicate option in S4HANA OP system.

Regards,

Ramana.

entry.title: Limitation on Quantity 1-5 fields on Accrual Calculation Account Type Base Object
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

Can we define custom fields like quantity6, quantity7 in following 2 objects under Configure Object Definition? 

  1. Accrual Calculation Account Type Base
  2. Accrual Calculation Base

As of now, we do have actual quantity, quantity 1 to 5 standard SF fields. These fields are used to generate accruals from recorded timesheet. We are almost using all these fields. We would like to check if we can define custom fields after quantity5 and use those fields to generate accrual from timesheet via Integration Centre. 

Would like to check if SAP SuccessFactors product support custom fields in Accrual Calculation Account Type Base Object. 

Thanks & Regards,
Arijit

Note - We do not have time tracking license.

entry.title: Requirement to Include "From Date" and "To Date" in Trial Balance & Excel Export - SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi,

We require that the "From Date" and "To Date" selected while generating the Trial Balance report in SAP Business One be explicitly included as fields/values in the Excel output.

Currently, while exporting the Trial Balance and other Financial reports to Excel, the selected date range is not visible in the output file. This creates difficulty when reviewing or sharing the report, as there is no direct reference to the reporting period in the exported document.

Regards,

Akshay

entry.title: Re: Story Report Todate not working
entry.content:
Hi,

Sometimes this happens to some dates. Try this formula instead (just put your date in it instead of orange):

TODATE(CONCAT(TOTEXT(DAY(CURRENTDATE())),CONCAT("/" ,CONCAT(TOTEXT(MONTH(CURRENTDATE())) ,CONCAT("/" ,TOTEXT(YEAR(CURRENTDATE())))))),"dd/mm/yyyy" )

entry.title: Re: What is a semantic tag? in detail
entry.content:
Hello @nithin_pranesh, Per understanding, you may want to know the link between semantic tags and project related apps? There are some apps are designed to show data based on semantic tags. For example, Project Cost Report / Project Budget Report / Project Profitability, etc. These apps use semantic tags. For more information, see KBA 2799100 - Fiori app 'Project Cost Report' / 'Project Budget Report' shows zero costs.
https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2799100
In a word, Apps such as Project Cost Report will only show costs posted to G/L Accounts which are mapped to the cost relevant items(assigned to a semantic tag) of a Financial Statement Version (FSV) YPS2, you need to make sure the precondition is set up correctly, thus the cost could be shown normally, for detailed steps, you can refer the attachment of KBA 2799100. Hope above information is helpful. Thanks & Best regards, Rachel

entry.title: Re: Stock Audit - Accumulated Quantity Zero with Accumula...
entry.content:
In Company Details, there is a checkbox "Manage Item Cost per Warehouse". If not ticked, item cost is determined on company level for all warehouses, which can lead to incorrect stock value if you are only looking at a single warehouse.

For example - you have an item with moving average costing method. You buy one piece to warehouse A for 10€, and another piece to warehouse B for 20€.

Moving average will be 15 for both warehouses (it's calculated on whole company level). If you sell a pice from warehouse B, and you check stock status of warehouse B, you will have a total of 0 pieces with 5€ value (you received 1 piece worth 20€, and sold 1 piece worth 15€).

I believe the best practice would be to always check this option to calculate cost per each warehouse, especially if you have different stock accounts for different warehouses, as this can create inconsistency in trial balance.

entry.title: Re: I've shared a story report to a manager but when the manager run the story report its blank
entry.content: Check Manager's RBPs. They need to have permissions in their role to see the data in the report. Once permissions are correct, they'll see the data

entry.title: Using javascript normalize("NFD") in IRPA/BPA
entry.content:
Hi, I wonder why its not possible to use normalize("NFD") directly in drag and drop acitvities in BPA?

for example something like "stepX.text.normalize("NFD")" - such formula gives error

But its possible to create custom script and use it the and it works.

Why is it like that? 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: #CoE#STWX Repository of Software Collection item
entry.content: Please use "Extensibility Inventory" to get Software Collection information of most items. Please add column 'Software Collection' to the list if it is not in the default header list.

entry.title: SAP CodeJam at Hicron (Wroclaw, Poland)
entry.content:
Hi,

we would like to organize an SAP JamCode at Hicron (Wroclaw, Poland) in the first week of July. 

Topic: Build AI services using the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, SAP AI Core and SAP generative AI Hub. 

Best regards

Agnieszka

entry.title: Re: FREE_SELECTIONS_DIALOG with Field names
entry.content:
Thanks I have a small step foreward.

I modified gs_field_texts-text in the select, before FREE_SELECTIONS_INIT.
I checked it in debug mode, and it was okay, but in display it stayed default in the red (tree) area, and changed only in the slect options section marked with yellow. ☹️

CONCATENATE gs_field_texts-text '(' gs_field_texts-fieldname ')' INTO gs_field_texts-text.
APPEND gs_field_texts TO gt_field_texts.

entry.title: Re: Is the Cloud Connector feature available for Kafka Sy...
entry.content:
The Kafka adapter on CPI cannot use Cloud Connector to connect to on-premises Kafka topics: 3146484 - Does Kafka adapter on HCI/CPI support Cloud Connector?

As a workaround, you could use Edge Integration Cell, which is installed on-premises.

entry.title: Re: Can't instantiate a fragment after Destory it
entry.content: Despite following your suggestion to destroy the fragment, I'm still facing a unique ID error. I even made sure to destroy all dependents by iterating through V.getDependents() and calling oD.destroy() on each before V.destroy(). While V.getDependents() appears empty after this process, suggesting the destroy function is working, SAP seems to be holding onto these IDs in memory.

entry.title: How to display the fields vertically
entry.content:
Hi there! please how can I show the fields vertically in one column under title "Description"

 

FORM f_prepare_AFFECT_DATA2.

CALL METHOD obj_test->prepare_affect_resultat2
  EXPORTING
    it_grp_nature    = gt_grp_nature
    it_description_a =  gt_affect_a2                 
  IMPORTING
    et_affect2_alv   =  gt_alv_affect2               
  .

ENDFORM.

FORM show_affect2.

  DATA: lt_fieldcat TYPE lvc_t_fcat,
        ls_fieldcat TYPE lvc_s_fcat,
        ls_layout   TYPE lvc_s_layo.

  g_subscreen = '0107'.

  " Define Field Catalog
  CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
  ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'REPORT_NOUVEAU'.
  ls_fieldcat-coltext   = 'Report Nouveau'.
  APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

  CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
  ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'RESULTAT_NET_I'.
  ls_fieldcat-coltext   = 'Résultat Net I'.
  APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

  CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
  ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'RESULTAT_NET_E'.
  ls_fieldcat-coltext   = 'Résultat Net E'.
  APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

  CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
  ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'PRELEVEMENT'.
  ls_fieldcat-coltext   = 'Prélèvement'.
  APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

  CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
  ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'AUTRE_PRELEVEMENT'.
  ls_fieldcat-coltext   = 'Autre Prélèvement'.
  APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

  ls_layout-zebra = abap_true.

  " Container and Grid Initialization
  IF go_container IS NOT BOUND.

    CREATE OBJECT go_container
      EXPORTING
        container_name              = 'CC_ALV1'
      EXCEPTIONS
        cntl_error                  = 1
        cntl_system_error           = 2
        create_error                = 3
        lifetime_error              = 4
        lifetime_dynpro_dynpro_link = 5
        OTHERS                      = 6.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
                 WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

  CHECK go_container IS BOUND.

  IF go_grid IS NOT BOUND.

    CREATE OBJECT go_grid
      EXPORTING
        i_parent = go_container
      EXCEPTIONS
        error_cntl_create = 1
        error_cntl_init   = 2
        error_cntl_link   = 3
        error_dp_create   = 4
        OTHERS            = 5.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
                 WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
    ENDIF.

  ENDIF.

  CALL METHOD go_grid->set_table_for_first_display
    EXPORTING
      is_layout       = ls_layout
    CHANGING
      it_outtab       = gt_alv_affect2
      it_fieldcatalog = lt_fieldcat.

ENDFORM.

Normally it show like this:

But I want to show it like this:

Thank you

entry.title: Promotion Functionality in SuccessFactors Compensation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have enabled promotion functionality in SuccessFactors Compensation by following this blog:

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blog-posts-by-members/employee-central-compensation-promotion-integration-in-successfactors/ba-p/13327323

I have few queries regarding promotion functionality:

  • can we have different publishing date for Job Information publishing based on country or location (Screenshot attached)
  • Is there any report available which can provide list of employees who got promoted
  • Supposed a different budget is required for promotion then how this can be handled
  • Can we configured field like adjustment and name it as promotion to enter values only for promotion increase.
  • Best practice is to create a new position for promotion.  If that employee is having direct reportees then his direct reportees position has to be updated with new position data before doing promotion ?

Can you please provide your inputs on the same

@xavierlegarrec 

Regards,

Satish Naik

entry.title: ABAP Error
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I am configuring on the ECC EHP8 (Trial Environment), on CAL. I get the following errors when I attempt to create a purchase order and also trying to create a business partner. Please see the attached errors and assist.

entry.title: ME21N Confirmation Control Key
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a problem. I try to new standart PO with ME21N tcode but confirmation control key field comes "0004 ınbound delivery" as a automatically, I don't want this situation. I checked the below steps but I don't reach the result.
1-) SPRO --- Logistics Execution --- Shipping --- Deliveries --- Define Order Confirmations for Inbound Deliveries (There isn't customizing with order type (purchasing)).

2-) I checked vendor  in FLVN01 Purchasing confirmation control key field with BP t-code but again confirmation control key field comes "0004 ınbound delivery" as a automatically.

How can I solve this problem?

Thx.

entry.title: Re: Unable to update it0584 subty 0002
entry.content:
I am facing the same issue too. Experts please help

Thanks

entry.title: Public Checkbox Not Visible in sap.ui.comp.smartvariants SmartVariantManagement on showShare='true'
entry.content:
I'm developing a freestyle SAPUI5 application which has FilterBar with table. I am using the demoKit sample code for this: https://ui5.sap.com/#/entity/sap.ui.comp.filterbar.FilterBar/sample/sap.ui.comp.sample.filterbar.DynamicPageListReport and  smartVariantMangement control with the following configuration:

<f:heading>
                    <svm:SmartVariantManagement id="svm" showShare="true" standardItemText="{i18n>reviewTitle}" />
                </f:heading>

Also, in my manifest.json, I have: "flexEnabled": true 

  • SAPUI5 version: 1.120.6

  • Backend: Java-based CAP application

  • Deployment: Both frontend and backend are deployed to SAP BTP (Fiori Launchpad site)

However, when I try to save a variant/view, the "Public" checkbox is not visible in the Save As or Manage Views dialogs.

Possible Issue:

I suspect this might be due to missing authorization, but I am unsure how this applies to BTP-only apps
Is there a way to enable public variant support or check missing authorizations in the BTP context?

 SAPUI5

entry.title: Re: SME files upload in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

Thanks for the reply!
I have checked the 1M1 scope guide, which requires the SAP Concur Professional Edition to integrate with SAP Concur. Another document using the app does not state the edition requirement for the integration.
I would like to further know that if the Concur edition is Standard Edition, is it still possible to perform the integration the same way using the Concur Integration Setup App?

Thanks!

Best Regards,
Will

entry.title: Re: Recruiting Marketing, Radial search without exposing...
entry.content: Posted the issue as an improvement request: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/349656

entry.title: Re: Split batch, Picking and PGI using single IDOC (SHPCO...
entry.content:
Hello, did you find an answer ?
I also would like to perform batch split and PGI in same idoc but did not succeed so far.

entry.title: Re: Getting error while adding New system in VS CODE using SAP Fiori generator.
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for the details and screenshots, and sorry you are encountering this error. I'd like to ask for some further details around the current set up. 

- Can you please confirm the version of the Fiori generator you are currently using? You can check easily using the information icon in the top left corner in the UI of the Fiori Application Generator to confirm the version.

- Please check in the SAP Systems Panel, and run Test Connection against the system you are trying to use. Please refer to the Help documentation on Managing Systems Connection. Screenshots will be useful in this case. 

Best regards,

Cian 

Fiori tools team

entry.title: Alerts and notifications have been trigger even though the effective date is way passed
entry.content:
Hello team,

Let me explain the situation:

The employees were imported to production System in February 2024

notification configuration was passed in June 2024 

so we triggered a job to collect those employees in the manage alert and notifications ec alerts so they would have their  FUTURE notifications pending to be triggered.

then we triggered EC alerts and not. job selecting January 2024 as the date.

What happened to our surprise is that notifications where the THEN statement in the rule is date plus + 4 days have been triggered also, although that date is way passed, the notification has been triggered anyway.

Is this the standard behavior to launch notifications long after the effective date has already passed?

entry.title: Re: How to display the fields vertically
entry.content:
Hi,

    I think its not possible to display the fields in vertical lining as fieldcat shows the fields one after the other but not one under the other. 

Rgds,

G. Khadeer Basha

entry.title: Help to close RE2 inbound delivery note
entry.content: We would like to delete a delivery note 8239001845 in Quality system . It’s got some kind-of corruption on it (maybe due to some part of the flow got archived) so they can’t delete in VL02N. we are getting short dump MESSAGE_TYPE_X in program CL_MSR_DEF_DB=================CP.

entry.title: Create new DME format under Format Tree UMS1 - S4Hana Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
We have a requirement for the XML output from the Fiori app 'Advance Return for Tax on Sales/Purchases'. As I understand, only the Tree type UMS1 can be used. 

How can I create a new Format tree under UMS1? In the Legacy system, it was very straight forward as you only needed transaction code DMEE. I do not seem to find anything similar in the Public Cloud Edition. 

Please let me know the steps, or if it is not possible, and we should open an SAP note.

I have attached some relevant screenshots from the mentioned Fiori app.

Regards, and thank you.

entry.title: SAP HCM: Org. Unit cannot be assigned to Position (PA30)
entry.content:
I have created some new Org. Units and accordingly made relations:

1. Position to Person

2. Position to Org. Unit

BUT only Position / Person relation is visible at PA30 >>> Org. Assignment infotype. However, Org Unit is showing 00000000.

Regards,

Jamil

entry.title: SAP Project Implementation Template
entry.content:
Hello guys,

Please, i need a SAP Ariba: Procurement Project Implementation Template

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - How to transition to Shared Environment - Shared to all users
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We recently added a new option that allows to share an environment to all users. This would ease the transition from public environment to shared environment as explained in a previous blog post.

How it works?

You can create a shared environment as usual. Now in the sharing you have a new option:

After selecting this option, you can decide the rights applicable for all users:

The bare minimum right would be "Monitor". With "Deploy" a Process Automation Developer would be granted to deploy a project in this shared environment.

At the end you will have all the benefits from Shared Environment already mentioned here or here. It's also possible to update an existing shared environment with this option too.

Development Tenant VS. Production Tenant

  • In a "development tenant", you may enable this new shared environment with all rights... except administrate.
  • In a "production tenant", you may restrict this new shared environment with the right "execute" only.

Choice is yours as Process Automation Administrator.

More information about:

  • API Keys - help topic
  • Processes and Workflows within Environment - help topic
  • Manage Destinations - help topic
  • Triggers - help topic
  • Add an API trigger to a project - help topic
  • SAP Note for public environment sunset - https://me.sap.com/notes/3522611

entry.title: Re: Connection issue in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello @KarthikKumar31 

I think I saw this error message in the past as well... but long time ago, 1-2 years.

First thing I would do is to check if the Cloud connector can reach your SAP Test system ... means does the icon in the CC appear in green, showing the system is reached.

If not, this is the root cause.

If yes, maybe you check SU53 for your connection user, after testing it again? Can you find any entries there?

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Request for Solution: CDS View with Parameters (Key D...
entry.content:
Hello @sridhar123sap 

I'm sorry, but I cannot see the list of CDS views here...

However, if the data changes permanently and the result is controlled by the key date, I would recommend to connect the CDS View directly to SAC as live model and build a story based on this.

If the CDS View is no analytic query, yet (annotation: @Analytics.query:true), then you could create one on top and use this for your live model in SAC.

In this way you can avoid loading daily data/delta and just report live on S4.

Otherwise you can maybe explain what you would like to do with the data in SAP datasphere.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA BP screen enhancement with custom tab
entry.content:
Hi Expert.

I am using BDT to enhance BP with three more customized tab page. All functions works fine.  there is a problem. the steps are as follows:

  1. opening BP 
  2. open one of the customized tab
  3. do some changes and save.

Update log information: like updated user and date should be only save for current active tab, however, the value of the similar fields on other two tabs updated as well in database.

All fields are appended to LFA1. is there any way to deal with such situation. In ECC, three different screens can be processed individually and no side effects between them. Thanks a lot.

 

Best Regards,

Walter

entry.title: Re: Don't show null values in the chart - SAC
entry.content:
Hello @daianealves 
I think we need a bit more information here ... is it based on an import model or live model?

Have you tried setting a background-filter to prevent those lines to be shown? Where do the null values come from?

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Help Portal: We're sorry, but this content is not acc...
entry.content:
Hi,

For access, send a message to: SAP_Private_Cloud_Help_Portal_Admin@sap.com - include your customer ID, email address and/or S-user.

This instruction appears on the following page: https://help.sap.com/docs/RISE_WITH_SAP_PRIVATE_CLOUD_EDITION

Hope this helps and best regards
Sue

entry.title: Re: Requirement to Include "From Date" and "To Date" in T...
entry.content:
Hi @hk-123 ,

I'm afraid this is not possible. However, the date range does appear on TB when exported to PDF. If you manage to export PDF > XLS, it could be a temporary measure until SAP includes the desired fields in the report output.

I hope it helps.

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: Item groups running with different valuation method S...
entry.content: If we cannot make the changes then what is impact or it is safe to move from Moving average to FIFO for all items groups (same as per company settings : FIFO)

entry.title: How do I know if SAP Cash Management is activated?
entry.content:
Hello!

How can we check in S/4HANA Public Cloud if SAP Cash Management is activated or not? What scope items belong to Cash Management?

entry.title: Re: 无鸟用的SAP PA证书，刚入行的同行可以考一考
entry.content: PA证书对于想系统学习SAP的人是非常有用的，作为顾问如果不完全了解SAP的模块功能就没办法给客户推荐最佳的方案，找工作方面其实SAP PA对于自由顾问来说确实没什么用，因为自由顾问要的是实战能力，而PA这种证书不能体现你的能力。但是入职Global甲方或者SAP这个证书还是有用的。

entry.title: Re: Fiori Custom Fields and Logic app error
entry.content:
Hi,

thanks for your comment.

I checked the in the transaction SOBJ the objects which are related to CUSY and I can confirm that all are set to display / change and they have a valid customizing transport request. 

I tried to look up a help in your mentioned webside but I did found one which could help me in this matter,  could you please post a direct link? 

Regards,
Adam

entry.title: Re: How to do background scheduling with clean core, including Fiori apps, replacing se38 reports
entry.content:
Hi @Juwin 

An action that allows DB insert I don't see coming, seeing as direct DB access in ABAP Cloud is not allowed but I'm also unsure about an action that allows your own commits, since the RAP framework usually takes care of it. I am not one of the makers of RAP, so can't comment on that, if that is possible.

But as for RAP being "counter-intuitive", I kindly disagree and try to explain, if you allow 😊. RAP is different, that's why it may seem counter-intuitive at first - as any language is, at first. These "restrictions"  in RAP are not restrictions, but stability features. RAP ensures that the end-to-end process of whichever behavior is to happen with your object, will be consistent and complete. Can you do a direct DB insert into a z-table in a user exit in classic ABAP? Yes you can. Is that a good thing/stable? No, not at all. You are in the middle of a safe sequence, of something that could, theoretically, still fail to save. But then you already did you direct DB update/insert, thus your data is now inconsistent with what in the end happened with your object. RAP won't allow direct DB inserts or commits during the safe sequence for exactly that reason, and that should never change.

Personally I don't think "additional save" causes any extra hassle. Does it really matter if your code runs directly in an action, unmanaged save, or where-ever you need to have it, or if it is in the additional save? In fact, having additional safe means that RAP isn't lacking in functionality. It simply forces a safe order of things. In this example here, yes it would have been nice to have the APJ creation directly in the action, I totally agree, and I even said "unfortunately we can't" above. But that isn't "RAP's fault": it's keeping my behavior safe and consistent (making sure the behavior first completes, then we can add other updates). In this case, what is missing is that APJ offers an API where I can create an application job that executes with the next commit (or at least let me decide whether I want to force commit or not) and does not always do a direct DB insert.

RAP is really powerful if you get to know it and offers so much out of the box, such as full save and read sequences with full OData query capabilities, including draft handling etc.; you don't need to code any of that. At the same time you can choose to create your own custom query provider. You can choose to create your own unmanaged save. RAP offers both ways; complete framework taking care of the main things or you do your custom codes yourself.

Hope that gave some ideas or insights.

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content: Nice work. I really like the new changes, they bring clarity!

entry.title: Re: Issue with intent recognition in the Chatbot
entry.content: I'm experiencing the same issue as well. Has anyone found a solution yet?
